---
title: "Gemini Quarto Comprehensive Test"
format: html
---

## 0. Setup
Run this cell first to load libraries.

```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore') # Silence warnings
%matplotlib inline
```

## 1. Matrix Calculation
Now this will be instantaneous.

```{python}
# Create two matrices
A = np.array([[1, 2], [3, 4]])
B = np.array([[5, 6], [7, 8]])

# Perform Dot Product
result = np.dot(A, B)
print("Matrix A:\n", A)
print("\nMatrix B:\n", B)
print("\nResult (A ⋅ B):\n", result)
```

## 2. Table Demonstration
```{python}
data = {
    'Category': ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D'],
    'Values': [45, 72, 12, 93],
    'Status': ['High', 'High', 'Low', 'High']
}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
df
```

## 3. Bar Graph (Seaborn)
```{python}
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))
sns.set_theme(style="whitegrid")
# Added hue and legend=False to fix the Seaborn warning
ax = sns.barplot(x='Category', y='Values', hue='Category', data=df, palette='crest', legend=False)
plt.title("Category Distribution", fontsize=16)
plt.show()
```

```
